title: penstemon degeneri
intro: Penstemon degeneri, also known as Degener's beardtongue, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae, native to the Hawaiian Islands. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Penstemon degeneri include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and reduce fever. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent.
